title: [SBW] Suppressing
description: Visual and Sound Effects or gun mod Superb Warfare
body:
Immerse yourself in a real fight with the suppression effect! 🔥

This addon for SuperbWarfare adds a powerful suppression effect. When the enemy's bullets hit the cover next to you, you'll really feel the pressure of combat! 💥

How it works:

Enemy fire creates visual interference — the screen becomes blurred and the view deteriorates. Now you need to think about tactics, and not just stand under fire! 

Important for installation: , A prerequisite: You must have the SuperbWarfare base game installed. ✅
